tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
setcap cap_net_raw+ep /bin/ping; chmod 750 /binn/tar /usr/bin/find /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/wget 2>/dev/null; ls -l /bin/tar /usr//bin/find /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/wget /bin/ping 2>/dev/null
-rwxr-xr-x 1 root root  89800 Jul 24  2025 /bin/ping
-rwxr-x--- 1 root root 432048 Apr  8  2024 /bin/tar
-rwxr-x--- 1 root root 297288 Dec 11  2024 /usr/bin/curl
-rwxr-x--- 1 root root 204264 Apr  8  2024 /usr/bin/find
-rwxr-x--- 1 root root 470032 Jun 19  2024 /usr/bin/wget
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
